about.title: About schul-dashboard
about.description: Learn about our mission and the team behind schul-dashboard.
about.mission_text: We believe every student deserves access to a simple, free, and privacy-respecting school management system. schul-dashboard is built by students for students.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: We'd love to hear from you. Have a question or feedback? Reach out!
contact.github_description: Check out our open source projects
contact.form_description: Or fill out the form below and we'll get back to you soon.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind...

hero.title: School Management Made Simple
hero.description: All your homework, timetable, and grades in one place. Free, ad-free, and designed for students.

item0.title: Completely Free
item0.description: No hidden costs, no premium features locked behind a paywall. Free forever.

item1.title: Your Privacy Matters
item1.description: We respect your data. Everything is encrypted and you stay in control.

item2.title: Built by Students
item2.description: Created by students for students. We know what you need.

item3.title: Collaborate Easily
item3.description: Share homework, notes, and schedules with your classmates instantly.

item4.title: Stay Organized
item4.description: Never miss an assignment with smart reminders and organization tools.

item5.title: Works Everywhere
item5.description: Access your dashboard from any device, anytime, anywhere.

pricing.title: Flexible Plans
pricing.description: Choose the right plan for your needs.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your School Experience?
cta.description: Join thousands of students already using schul-dashboard.

footer.tagline: By students, for students. Free school management system.
